title: Cryptool.io landing page is live
content_html:
The new Cryptool landing page is now live at cryptool.io.

Take a look and let the team know what you think. Feedback from the community will shape the next iteration, so anything that feels unclear or could be better, we want to hear it.

This is the start of a busy period for the platform. The modules are coming next.
author: Cryptool
